title: Executive, Settlements/Operations with Commodity trading MNC
description:
• Has around 2 years of related settlement, operations and contracts administration experience gained in the commodity trading sector.
  • Has good understanding of the trade lifecycle and settlement processes for physical and/or financial commodities.
  • Familiarity with industry documentation such as contracts, invoices, and trade confirmations. Added Experience with trading/settlement systems is preferred (but not a must)

Our client is a renowned oil & gas/ LNG trading MNC based in town (located very near to a MRT station). The co allows for a WFH arrangement once a week. For this role, you work in a team with the following principal duties/Responsibilities:

  • Process daily settlements of physical and/or financial commodity trades.
  • Reconcile invoices, confirmations, and settlement statements with internal trade capture systems and external counterparties.
  • Investigate and resolve discrepancies in pricing, volumes, fees, and payment terms.
  • Ensure that the contract terms are applied properly to settlement (e.g., payment terms, pricing formulas).
  • Monitor and track payment flows, including wire instructions and due dates.
  • Maintain accurate records and support month-end closing.
  • Assist in system testing, process automation, and efficiency improvements.
  • Stay informed about relevant market practices, regulatory requirements, and internal compliance standards.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or tertiary qualified with around 1 to 5 years of related settlement, operations and settlement experience gained in the commodity trading sector.
  • Has commodity trading exposure, be it hard commodities or soft commodities (specific oil and gas and LNG trading experience is not required)
  • Strong analytical and reconciliation skills with high attention to detail.
  • Proficiency in Excel;
  • Experience with trading/settlement systems is preferred.
  • Excellent communication skills for liaising with internal stakeholders and counterparties.
  • Has basic accounting knowledge or is numeric in nature
  • Has a good work attitude. Stable and professional

Desirable experiences and knowledge

  • Solid understanding of the trade lifecycle and settlement processes for physical and/or financial commodities.
  • Familiarity with industry documentation such as contracts, invoices, and trade confirmations.

To apply, pl send your cv in word doc to resume@cap-cg.com . Pl also include details on your current salary, expected salary and notice period in your cv.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Posted by:

CAP Consulting (EA license: 14C7175)

Caroline Poh (EA Registration: R1105649)

Date ad is posted - 29 January 2026

postedCompany.description:
CAP Consulting is a regional boutique executive recruitment firm with a focus on Singapore and the Asia region. The firm was established in 2014 by Caroline Poh, a veteran finance search professional with more than 20 years of search and recruitment experience. Its focus is to provide a results oriented and solutions based approach to executive recruitment and search that is vital in the increasingly dynamic and complex marketplace.  


In the financial service sector, we cover roles across sectors including front line/investment, middle office, finance and operations. Specific roles that we work on include General Management, Investment, M&A, Sales, Strategy Risk, Compliance, Consulting, Treasury, Corporate Finance, Operations, IA and other corporate functions ( Corporate Affairs, HR, Accounting).  


For the sectors outside of financial service, we also cover Financial and Professional Services, Commodity, Consumer, Healthcare/ Pharmaceutical, Industrial, Logistics, Manufacturing, Oil & Gas, Technology and Telecommunications. The roles that we specialise in include Finance/Accounting, HR, General Management, Technology, Sales & Marketing, Legal/Compliance/Risk, Business Development/Commercial, Operations etc.
postedCompany.name: THE CAP CONSULTING GROUP PTE. LTD.
